stadium.name: The Aegis Field
stadium.description: A pristine field within the main temple compound, used as the central training ground for the Shield. The pitch is bordered by the library and monastery, and is said to be protected by the twin lights, Dawn's Hope and Silver Twilight.

stats.pregame_ritual: Tying their bootlaces together and hopping to the starting line.
Re-taping their shield's handle with fresh leather.
Whispering a secret fear to the Trollball before the game.
Drinking a full waterskin of lukewarm water.
Drawing a detailed, anatomically incorrect diagram of a troll's head.
Passing a 'team luckstone' from player to player without speaking.
Chewing a specific, bitter root said to improve night vision.
Jogging three laps around the perimeter of the field.
Kissing their biceps and whispering words of encouragement to them.
Trying to teach a stray dog a complicated and useless new trick.
Challenging a spectator to a game of tic-tac-toe in the dirt.

stadium.name: Fletchings Field
stadium.description: Fletchings Field was the first formal Troll Ball stadium in Warden lands. The design balances wood and stone, with arrowhead motifs and banners representing each region under Warden protection. The field includes trees, gully's and other obstacle placements, changed each match by local druids and terrain crafters.

stats.pregame_ritual: Going over the game plan drawn in the dirt with the team captain.
Leading the team in a synchronized chant that slowly gets louder.
Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.
Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.
Giving the Trollball a heroic backstory before each game.
Headbutting their own team's goal post (gently).
Sticking a specific type of feather in their helmet's plume.
Burying their helmet in the ground and then digging it back up.
Reading their own fortune in a scattering of knuckle bones.
Wearing a specific, garishly colored pair of undergarments.
Always putting on their left gauntlet before their right.

preGame: Hark, citizens of Osterra! Gather 'round, grab your finest ale, and settle in for the greatest contest to ever shake the very foundations of this blessed, yet maddening, plane! It is Tuesday Night Trollball, and the tension is thicker than the swamp mist clinging to Fletchings Field! This isn't just another scrap; this is the Grand Finals Bracket Reset! The New Monteforte Chaos Creatures have clawed their way back, and now the spotlight shines upon the clash of titans: the magnificent Oak & Onslaught, backed by the glorious cheer of the Warden lands, taking on the perpetually smug Haven Lights! Oh, to see the Ebon Gate Corruptors here! A victory for the Corruptors would be a glorious act of cosmic vandalism!
postGame:
GOOD GRIEF AND GLORY! What a spectacle! A whirlwind of flesh, fury, and flung leather right here at The Aegis Field! The Haven Lights, bless their sanctimonious hearts, managed to survive the onslaught, but the sheer brutality displayed by Oak & Onslaught was enough to bring the very gods to tears! The play-by-play was a carnival of chaos, starting with Shiroma Salim seizing the ball and the divine glow of the Hallowed Ground seeming to shine on Farand Keil! But hold onto your hats, folks, because the tackling never stopped! Normi Glaudia, bless her Mallet-wielding might, slammed into Berkin Waters, and the beautiful game suffered an injury! Abner Seidel laid into Farand Keil, sending that pious warrior sprawling! But the true star of the show, the magnificent beacon of the Lights, was Tybi Reo! After dodging every desperate tackle from the Oak contingent, she burst through the defense and DUNKS THE BALL INTO THE GOAL! A two-point thunderbolt! 

The action didn't pause for breath, even during the mid-match respite! We saw the warriors rally, the healers tending their wounded, and the scramble for possession was endless! But it was the grit, the sheer, magnificent refusal to quit, that defined this contest! The Oak players were relentless, constantly trying to impose their will, but the Haven Lights just kept dancing, dodging, and occasionally landing a glorious, bone-shattering hit! The blessed field tried to keep them virtuous, but the brute force of Trollball broke through that divine veneer!

And so, as the final minutes wind down, with Zwart Bunns passing the ball to the mighty Wieren Ivar, the outcome is sealed! The Haven Lights have clawed out the victory! They managed to stave off the crushing might of Oak & Onslaught, proving that even a team obsessed with purity can succumb to the glorious grime of the game! A bitter pill to swallow for the Corruptors faithful, but what a performance! The score stands at Oak & Onslaught zero, and The Haven Lights one! The lights shine, but tonight, my friends, the CORRUPTION reigns supreme in spirit, even if the ledger says otherwise!
